design_decisions.d0_open_oeq_residuals: Open-ended question(s) left as the note's acknowledged open problem for D0.5 review: oeq:uniform-contact-inference

proposed_from.topic: exact no-cancellation compatibility frontier for simultaneous NUC and study-exchangeability sensitivity: characterize K(P) by C_P(rho,gamma)=max_t E[(L_t-U_t)_+], and derive cross-fitted nuisance-robust contact-set inference uniformly over the two-parameter frontier including interval ties, with the verified two-stratum cancellation witness and the regular local separation boundary; fixes the average-overlap/fixed-nuisance incompatibility test used by Lanners et al. (NeurIPS 2025) in Project STAR
proposed_from.novelty_justification: Theorem 1 strictly replaces an averaged signed compatibility diagnostic with the necessary-and-sufficient zero set of a nonnegative conditional-violation functional. The two-stratum proposition exhibits a failure of the legacy diagnostic. The open inference node combines learned data-fusion envelopes, directional ties, and two-parameter contact-set inversion not covered by the closest inference comparators.
seed_list: Local separation frontier for compatibility testing

seed_details.rebuttal: The nontrivial direction constructs one common latent law and excludes cross-stratum cancellation.
It lacks cross-fitted causal envelopes and a two-parameter contact frontier.
The positive-part envelope has nuisance learning and tie regimes absent from the comparator.
Potentially sharp but less direct than feasibility.
Needs a distinct closed-form critical object.
The joint sensitivity constraints differ, but the advance is mainly representational.

seed_details.red_team: A witness is only an example.
seed_details.rebuttal: Would require a generic alternative class and minimax comparison.
A sharp constrained envelope is possible but not the strongest kernel.

proposed_from.literature_map: Lanners et al. introduce simultaneous sensitivity bounds but use a signed expectation diagnostic and fixed-nuisance resampling. Parikh et al. establish the data-fusion falsification motivation without simultaneous feasibility. Chernozhukov--Lee--Rosen provide contact-set inference, Masten--Poirier frontier bands, Fang--Santos directional-bootstrap theory, and Chernozhukov et al. cross-fitted orthogonal-score theory; none supplies the exact learned no-cancellation compatibility frontier.

banked_reason: Sound math, over-framed novelty: the central inference question (uniform coverage/level of the proposed directional-delta procedure) is left open, and the two closest competitors (Masten-Poirier 2020 breakdown frontiers, Luedtke-van der Laan 2016 tie non-regularity) are cited in the bibliography but never engaged in the body.
